dimensionDescriptions.multi_source_fusion: Explain how different telemetry sources (identity, endpoint, network, email, or SIEM) combine to support or challenge the overall interpretation.
dimensionDescriptions.narrative_coherence: Present a logical storyline of the incident progression and clarify which elements are confirmed observations versus analytical assumptions.
dimensionDescriptions.alternative_hypotheses: Consider at least one plausible alternative explanation and briefly explain why it appears less consistent with the available evidence.
dimensionDescriptions.detection_gap: Identify a visibility or detection limitation that may have allowed the activity to progress or remain undetected.
dimensionDescriptions.prioritization: Explain why the selected response or action appears most important given the current risk and operational constraints.
dimensionDescriptions.containment_strategy: Describe the immediate response steps that could reduce risk while maintaining operational stability.
dimensionDescriptions.evidence_preservation: Explain how containment or response actions could affect the preservation of forensic artifacts.
dimensionDescriptions.stakeholder_communication: Communicate conclusions clearly in language appropriate for decision-makers while maintaining technical accuracy.
dimensionDescriptions.risk_reasoning: Explain how the chosen risk level reflects likely impact and the scope of the potential compromise.
dimensionDescriptions.confidence_reasoning: Explain why the selected confidence level reflects both the strength of evidence and remaining uncertainty.
dimensionDescriptions.uncertainty_collection: Identify one or two additional investigative steps that could significantly clarify the situation.
dimensionDescriptions.tradeoff: Explain operational or investigative tradeoffs associated with the recommended response approach.

reportSections.title: Executive Summary
reportSections.template: Briefly summarize what most likely occurred, the potential organizational risk, and the most important response decision.

reportSections.title: Situation Overview
reportSections.template: Distinguish confirmed observations from assumptions and note any important telemetry limitations.

reportSections.title: Incident Narrative
reportSections.template: Describe the likely progression of the incident from initial access through impact, identifying where uncertainty remains.

reportSections.title: Evidence Overview
reportSections.template: Identify several important artifacts and explain how each supports or challenges the overall interpretation.

reportSections.title: Primary Hypothesis and Alternatives
reportSections.template: Explain the leading interpretation and briefly consider at least one alternative explanation.

reportSections.title: Risk Assessment
reportSections.template: Discuss the likely impact and exposure of the incident and explain how these factors support the selected risk level.

reportSections.title: Confidence and Remaining Uncertainty
reportSections.template: Explain the confidence level and identify key unknowns that could change the current assessment.

reportSections.title: Response and Containment Considerations
reportSections.template: Discuss recommended response steps and any operational tradeoffs associated with those actions.

reportSections.title: Detection and Visibility Improvements
reportSections.template: Identify one significant detection or monitoring gap and suggest a potential improvement.

reportSections.title: Professional Conclusion
reportSections.template: Summarize the recommended next steps for the next phase of investigation or response.

gapRules.prompt: Consider linking evidence from multiple telemetry sources to strengthen the overall explanation of events.
You may want to present a clearer sequence of events showing how the incident progressed.
Consider discussing at least one alternative explanation and why it appears less consistent with the evidence.
Explain why the selected response action appears most important at this stage.
Consider explaining how response actions may affect the preservation of investigative evidence.
You may want to identify one monitoring or detection limitation that influenced the outcome.
Explain how the available evidence supports the chosen confidence level.
Consider identifying one or two investigative steps that could most quickly clarify the situation.
